name: maintenance room 2
hints: There are useful tools here. Both may be needed for your mission.
GET MOP and GET CUTTERS. The wire cutters can cut alarm wires. The mop cleans things.
GET CUTTERS (to cut alarm wires in the window). GET MOP for cleaning up. UP leads to the projectionist room.
notes: Maintenance room with wire cutters (cut alarm wires in the visitors room window) and a yarn mop. EAST returns to yellow corridor (room 14). UP leads to the projectionist room (room 18).
